items.name_en: 🆕N40748 Blue Check! The 'zippie wallet' from the 'damiericious' series reinterprets damier canvas with charming colors. A special edition item, this iconic wallet features a slim silhouette and a round zipper closure, creating a fresh and feminine atmosphere with soft colors. The cleverly designed interior is divided into multiple compartments for bills, cards, and documents. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm

It reinterprets the classic Monogram DLd pattern using jacquard fabric technology and creates a stonewashed denim effect. 12 x 7 x 1.5 cm.

items.name_en: 🆕 Top-tier Original M82959 Blue Denim Wallet Series Victorine Wallet Ams Enveluff style compact Viktoline Wallet. Reinterpreting the Louis Vuitton iconic Monogram pattern with jacquard denim and a stone-washed effect. Features two flat pockets and a spacious design with many card slots. Includes a press stud type locking device for secure storage. Dimensions: 12 x 9.5 x 1.5 cm.

🆕 M82392
Made of Monogram Unplant leather featuring a stamped Monogram pattern, this "Portomone Rozari" is a small wallet with a circular flap decorated with a button snap. The interior features a flat pocket, a zipper coin pocket, and 2 card slots.
Size:11 8 2.5

items.name_cn:
🆕 M82206
Exclusive edition of the 'Zippy Wallet' for the 'Gradient' collection this season. Featuring a high-end gradient on soft, embossed Monogram Unplant leather in summer tones. A signature wallet characterized by a slender silhouette. A zip opening with a cleverly designed interior featuring multiple card slots, pockets, and compartments.
Size: 19.5 10.5 2.5

items.name_cn:
🆕 M82348
A "Portefeuille Victorine" for the "Gradient" collection. Reinterpreted with a beautiful gradient in Monogram Unplant leather featuring summer tones. Despite its compact size, it features multiple pockets and 6 card slots, making the surprisingly large interior a charm. A gold button with the "Louis Vuitton" signature on the decorative flap adds a touch of color.
Dimensions: 12 9.5 1.5
